subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God in Al-Ḥadbá! We make mention of you from this Most Exalted Station. Blessed are ye, inasmuch as ye have found [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اماء الله فی الحدباء انا نذکرکن فی هذا المقام الاعلی طوبی لکن بما وجدتن
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @justice and wrath of God
